headline: Is It Worth Investing in Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Interactive Brokers (IBKR) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
